name: FEAT-001 story execution
description: User advances FEAT-001 to approved. Each story within FEAT-001 executes in dependency order, starting with the decision-enacted boundary changes (STORY-001/002/003 for model-pin, thinking-seam, parseModelSpec move) and proceeding to the consumer call-site migration (STORY-004/005), bundled YAML updates (STORY-006), duplicate removal (STORY-007), empirical verification (STORY-008), and issue closeout (STORY-009).
exit_criteria: All nine stories in FEAT-001.stories in complete state
The five existing issues named in blocks_resolved are closed in issues.json or migrated to their scope-owned registries
pi-workflows and pi-behavior-monitors import agent infrastructure from pi-jit-agents
